name: explain
description: Explain a concept at multiple levels: simple, medium, expert

simple.name: Simple
simple.prompt: Explain "$1" like I'm 10 years old. Use an analogy. Keep it to 2-3 sentences.

medium.name: Medium
medium.prompt: Explain "$1" at a college level. Include key terminology. One short paragraph.

expert.name: Expert
expert.prompt: Explain "$1" for a domain expert. Include nuances, edge cases, and current debates. One paragraph.

synthesize.name: Synthesize

default.system_prompt: You are a teacher. Be clear, accurate, and concise. Output only the explanation.

editor.system_prompt: You are a science writer who makes complex topics accessible. Output only the final text.
